description: Add two independent control-plane-to-runner messages whose union updates overlap, then document both without losing either change during integration.

userStories.title: Add whole-run dispatch message
userStories.description: In src/protocol.ts add and export RunDispatchMsg, discriminated by t: 'dispatch_run', with required runId, goal, workspaceId, parallel, timeoutSecs and optional route: DispatchRoute. Add it to ToRunner while preserving every existing union member.
acceptance: RunDispatchMsg has the exact requested fields
ToRunner accepts RunDispatchMsg without losing existing message variants

userStories.title: Add runner rejection message
userStories.description: In src/protocol.ts add and export RejectMsg for a control plane refusing a runner. It is discriminated by t: 'rejected' and has a required reason: string. Add it to ToRunner while preserving every existing union member, including changes made by other stories.
acceptance: RejectMsg has t: 'rejected' and reason: string
ToRunner accepts RejectMsg without losing existing message variants

userStories.title: Document both control messages
userStories.description: After both protocol changes are integrated, update README.md to concisely document dispatch_run and rejected, and state that existing story dispatch remains supported.
